title: Metrics Collection
requirements:
Track cycle time, stage durations, retry rates, and learning effectiveness.

1. Create schemas/metrics.schema.json with fields:
   - ticket, started_at, completed_at (nullable), outcome (enum: completed, escalated, aborted), cycle_time_seconds (nullable), stages array (name, started_at, completed_at, duration_seconds, retries, escalated), tasks object (total, completed, retried, blocked), qa object (auto_fix_runs, auto_fix_resolved, test_failures, test_retries), review object (critic_rounds, pr_feedback_rounds, escalations), learning object (standing_instructions_injected, patterns_detected, repairs_applied)

2. Create scripts/collect-metrics.sh:
   - Args: <ticket_id>
   - Parses run.log (JSONL) to extract stage transitions, retry counts, error counts
   - Reads PRD.json for task counts, REVIEW.json for critic rounds, FEEDBACK.json for PR feedback rounds, ESCALATION.json for escalation count
   - Computes cycle time from first to last log entry, per-stage durations
   - Writes runs/{ticket_id}/METRICS.json
   - Validates against metrics.schema.json

3. Create scripts/aggregate-metrics.sh:
   - Scans all runs/*/METRICS.json
   - Computes: average cycle time (overall + per stage), escalation rate, most common escalation categories, retry rate per agent, auto-fix resolution rate, critic rounds distribution, learning system effectiveness
   - Output: JSON summary

4. Integrate metrics into run summary:
   - Update run-summary.sh: call collect-metrics.sh at end of every run
   - Add key metrics to terminal banner (cycle time, task completion, escalations)

5. Dashboard metrics tab:
   - Update dashboard/server.js: serve METRICS.json + aggregate metrics
   - Update dashboard/index.html: add Metrics tab (global) with cycle time trend, escalation rate, retry heatmap, learning effectiveness. Per-ticket: stage duration breakdown, task progress

6. Write tests:
   - Test collect-metrics.sh with a completed run's run.log
   - Test collect-metrics.sh with an escalated run
   - Test aggregate-metrics.sh with multiple runs
   - Test dashboard metrics tab renders
acceptance_criteria: schemas/metrics.schema.json exists with all required fields
scripts/collect-metrics.sh parses run.log and produces valid METRICS.json
scripts/aggregate-metrics.sh computes averages across multiple runs
run-summary.sh calls collect-metrics.sh at end of every run
Terminal banner includes cycle time, task completion, escalation counts
Dashboard has Metrics tab with cycle time trend, escalation rate, retry heatmap
Per-ticket view shows stage duration breakdown and task progress
